post_run_cleanup_audit.method: exact PID process-table query plus run-id temp-root search

adjudication.authoritative_cleanup_observation: all exact harness PIDs and the run-id temporary root were absent; the pre-existing unrelated TextEdit PID was unchanged
adjudication.reason: the counted report remains failed; this separate adjudication accepts only the 3/3 independently confirmed file effects and the fail-closed two-match ambiguity refusal

scope.accepted_claim: On one macOS 15.7.3 host, candidate b1b61a5 completed three isolated TextEdit replace-and-save trials with exact file-byte effects and refused a two-window ambiguous selector without changing either file.
limitations: one host and active user session
the revised cleanup harness has offline adversarial coverage but was not validated by another GUI run
